title: cyrtandra gillespieana
intro: Cyrtandra gillespieana, also known as the Gillespie's cyrtandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae that is native to the island of Maui in Hawaii. The plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyrtandra gillespieana are said to include relief from respiratory issues, skin irritations, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve overall well-being. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat various ailments and promote health and wellness.
